International Shipping We offer worldwide shipping with the following estimated delivery times:

USA- 5-7 days

Asia: 7-10 days
Rest of world: 7-14 business days

Return Process: Returns for store credit and exchanges are free. Items must be in new, undamaged condition. They also must be returned in original, protective packaging to ensure your return arrives safe and sound.

Once you ship the item back using our provided label and it arrives at our warehouse, our team will inspect it to ensure everything is in perfect condition.

Refunds: Once the item is collected and inspected, your refund will be processed to the original form of payment. Please note:

Return shipping costs will be deducted
A $10 processing fee applies to all refunds
Store credit and exchanges are free from these fees

Important Information for International Customers Please be aware that customs duties and import taxes may apply to US and international orders. Buyers are responsible for any applicable customs fees, import duties, or taxes imposed by their local government.

We recommend checking with your local customs office before placing an order to understand potential additional costs. Please note that we cannot control or be held responsible for customs delays or associated fees.

Size: Width: 94X32 cm / 37X12.5 inch | 120X32 cm / 47X12.5 inch
Height: 50 cm / 19.5 inch

Production and shipping time: We make each piece to order in our studio. Please allow 10 - 15 business days for us to make & ship your purchase.

We accept Mastercard, Visa, and American Express. You can make up to 3 payments without any commission. We also accept PayPal for your convenience.

Buyers are responsible for any customs and import taxes that may apply. We are not responsible for delays due to customs.

You can place it in your living room or bedroom, for that extra pop of color and texture in the room.
it can also serve as a wonderful gift to your design-enthusiastic friends and family:)

Size: 40X40 cm / 16X16 inch
Height: 50 cm / 19.6 inch

Custom order: We can stain paint the wooden stool to walnut or black. if you are interested, just add a note with the color of your choice at the note section at checkout.
